spells.name: Projected Light
spells.notes: Beam of light (like a flashlight) springs from the caster’s palm; it has a 50' effective range. If the caster’s hand is closed into a fist, the light will “turn off”. If the caster’s fist is reopened before the end of the duration, the light will turn on again.

spells.name: Light I
spells.notes: Lights a 10'R area about the point touched. This spell may be cast onto a target as explained in Section 10.17.

spells.name: Aura
spells.notes: Causes a bright aura about the target, providing a more powerful appearance and subtracting 10 from all attacks on the target.

spells.name: Lights II
spells.notes: As Light I, except 1 or 2 areas can be created with a total radius of 20' (e.g., one area of 20'R or two areas of 10’R) and the location(s) for the light(s) need not be touched.

spells.name: Sudden Light
spells.notes: Causes a 10'R burst of intense light, all within are stunned (-50) for 1 round per 10 failure.

spells.name: True Aura
spells.notes: As Aura, except it produces an extremely powerful appearance and subtracts 15 from all attacks.

spells.name: Shock Bolt I
spells.notes: A bolt of intense, charged light is shot from the palm of the caster; results are determined on the Lightning Bolt attack table, as a Miniscule attack.

spells.name: Lights III
spells.notes: As Lights II, except up to three areas can be created with a total radius of 30'.

spells.name: Utterlight I
spells.notes: Nullifies all magically created darkness in a 10'R, and lights that area as full daylight.

spells.name: Waiting Light
spells.notes: As Light I, except caster can delay the spell up to 24 hours; it can be triggered by one of the following (decided by caster): elapsed time, specific movements, specific sounds, touch, etc.

spells.name: Flare
spells.notes: A ball of light one foot in diameter is shot from the palm of the caster: it will travel to the limit of Long range, explode (as a flare), burn with a bright light (as a flare), drift slowly to earth, and go out. An area equal to the range is lit if the flare can rise to its full range; drops 10'/round. It can be fired at a target as a Small Fire Bolt.

spells.name: Illumination II
spells.notes: As Lights II, except duration is one hour per level.

spells.name: Lights V
spells.notes: As Lights II, except up to five areas can be created with a total radius of 50'.

spells.name: Utterlight III
spells.notes: As Utterlight I, except up to three areas can be created with a total radius of 30'

spells.name: Lights X
spells.notes: As Lights II, except up to ten areas can be created with a total radius of 100'.

spells.name: Illumination III
spells.notes: As Lights III, except duration is one hour per level.

spells.name: Utterlight V
spells.notes: As Utterlight I, except up to five areas can be created with a total radius of 50'

spells.name: Mass Lights
spells.notes: As Lights II, except total radius is 10' per level and this may be split between a number of areas equal to the caster’s level.

spells.name: Illumination V
spells.notes: As Lights V, except duration is one hour per level.

spells.name: Mass Aura
spells.notes: As Aura, except as many targets as the caster’s level can be affected.

spells.name: Shock Ball
spells.notes: Caster extends a finger and a 1" globe of blue-white light shoots out to the target location, then erupts in arcs of electricity in a 40' sphere. Attack is resolved on the Lightning Ball table as a Miniscule attack.

spells.name: Alkar
spells.notes: As Aura, except target seems like a minor god and the subtraction is 25.

spells.name: Mass True Aura
spells.notes: As True Aura, except as many targets as the caster’s level can be affected.

spells.name: Mass Illumination
spells.notes: As Mass Lights, except duration is one hour per level.

spells.name: Mass Utterlights
spells.notes: As Utterlight I, except total radius is 10' per level and this may be split between a number of areas equal to the caster’s level.

spells.name: Boiling Heat
spells.notes: For each level of the caster, one cubic foot of liquid can be heated to boiling at a rate of 1 cubic foot per round. Once the caster ceases concentration, the liquid (if any remains) will cool normally.

spells.name: Warm Solid
spells.notes: Any solid, inanimate, non-metal material (up to 1 cubic foot per level) can be warmed to 100°F (38°C) at a rate of 1 cubic foot per round.

spells.name: Woodfires
spells.notes: Causes any wood to ignite and burn. All wood ignited must be within 1' of caster’s palm.

spells.name: Wall of Fire
spells.notes: Creates an opaque wall of fire (up to 10'x10'x6"). Anyone passing through it takes an A Heat critical (no RR).

spells.name: Heat Solid
spells.notes: As Warm Solid, except for duration and material can be heated to 500°F (260°C) at a rate of one cubic foot heated by 100°F (56°C) per round. The caster must concentrate to increase the temperature (without concentration, the material will retain its current temperature for the duration of the spell).

spells.name: Fire Bolt I
spells.notes: A bolt of fire is shot from the palm of the caster; results are determined on the Fire Bolt Table.

spells.name: Call Flame I
spells.notes: Creates a cube of flame (up to 10'x10'x10'); it takes 1 complete round for the cube to form and be effective. Anyone passing through (or caught within) the cube takes an A Heat critical each round spent in the cube.

spells.name: Fire Ball
spells.notes: A 1' diameter ball of fire is shot from the palm of the caster. Upon reaching the selected target/location, it expands to affect a 10'R area. Resolve attack on the Fire Ball Table.

spells.name: Ignite
spells.notes: The caster may designate a type of light source to ignite or extinguish (e.g., candles, torches, fireplaces, or lanterns). This spell will affect all of the light sources of the specified type(s) within the area of effect.

spells.name: Circle Aflame
spells.notes: As Wall of Fire, except “wall” is 10' high and forms a 10'R circle (6" thick) with the caster at the center (it is non-mobile).

spells.name: Fire Bolt III
spells.notes: As Fire Bolt I, except range increment is 75'.

spells.name: Call Flame II
spells.notes: As Call Flame I, except cube is up to 20'x20'x20' in size and the range is 20'.

spells.name: Waiting Flame
spells.notes: As Call Flame I, except the effect can be delayed for up to 24 hours. The effect can be triggered by one of the following (decided by the caster at time of casting): time period, certain movements, certain sounds, touch, violent actions in the area, or any other trigger so long as the caster would be able to sense it if the caster remained at the area of effect.

spells.name: Firestorm
spells.notes: As Call Flame I, except small balls of flame rain down in a 10' cube causing a B Heat critical to all within or passing through the area of effect.

spells.name: Metal Fires
spells.notes: Causes a metal object to burst into flames, the object can be up to 1 lb/level in mass. If the object is on a being, it gets an RR, and if it fails, the being takes an automatic Heat critical of a severity to be determined by its location on the being’s body. If the object is touching exposed flesh, the being takes a C Heat critical; if the object is touching through cloth, the being takes a B Heat critical; any being within a 1'R takes an A Heat critical.

spells.name: Triad of Flame
spells.notes: Three bolts of fire are shot from the palm of the caster. They can strike up to three different targets as long as they are all within 60° of each other and are within the caster’s field of vision. Caster may apply his Directed Spell skill by dividing it as he chooses among the three bolts (e.g., a +120 OB could be split evenly into three +40 bolts or one +120 bolt and two +0 bolts or one +60, one +40, and one +20 bolt).

spells.name: Fire Bolt V
spells.notes: As Fire Bolt I, except range increment is 125'.

spells.name: Waiting Firestorm
spells.notes: As Waiting Flame, except a Firestorm can be delayed.

spells.name: Call Flame V
spells.notes: As Call Flame I, except the size is up to a 50' cube and the range is 50'.

spells.name: Corner Fires
spells.notes: As Fire Bolt III, except caster can make the bolt turn once by up to 90° before striking the target (the caster must know the target’s location). The caster’s OB is modified by -25 when using this spell. However, this spell can be used to bypass a positional modifier – any DB bonus gained through the use of cover (partial/half/full soft cover; partial/half/full hard cover) is reduced to zero if the turn circumvents the cover; a target that otherwise would be unable to be hit can be attacked using this spell.

spells.name: Following Fires
spells.notes: As Corner Fires, except bolt can make as many turns as necessary, with an OB penalty of -25 per turn, and go through openings (must be larger than 6" radius) to strike the target.

spells.name: Stone Fires
spells.notes: A stone surface of up to 300 sq. ft. bursts into flames, and a C Heat critical is given each round to anything passing through (or spending the round in) the 3' flames.

spells.name: Following Fires True
spells.notes: As Following Fires, except there is no penalty to OB.

spells.name: Dragon's Fire
spells.notes: A cone of fire resembling the breath weapon of a fire-breathing dragon shoots from the caster’s hand or face, with a diameter of 1' at its origin point at the caster increasing to a diameter of 50' at the termination of the cone 100' away. Results of this attack are determined using the Fire Ball table.

spells.name: Fire Mastery
spells.notes: Caster can use any one lower level spell (on this list) each round.
